template.description: Page template: full-width navbar and centered content container (max 1920px, responsive 1440/1280). Optional floating sidebar and overlay drawer.

structure.navbar: 100% width using var(--layout-navbar-width), edge to edge.
structure.content: Centered container with max-width var(--layout-content-max-width), horizontal padding var(--layout-content-pad-x), and 16-column grid.
structure.sidebar: Optional floating sidebar that does not force content beyond max width.
structure.drawer: Overlay drawer that does not affect page content width.

template.responsive: Use md/sm max-width tokens at <=1440px and <=1280px.
template.whenToUse: Use when users ask for template/layout scaffolding.
